description: Style NoteThe Spanish influences in the design details of this  sandals  is the reason for the Spanish name, senorita. Subtle pastel hues, super soft footbed styling and classic designs with a sophisticated polish, style this pair with kohl-rimmed eyes and an ethno-western ensemble!Product DescriptionBlack Sandals with textured forefoot and midfoot straps in dull goldSmooth footbedTPU outsole with textured grooves on the forefoot and an upraised heel with textured groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
